board_gate: REQUIRED before any finding teaches or is implemented: the advisory board independently critiques these findings, cross-checks them against freshly-obtained outside data (current trending items, market/crypto movers), and verifies or refutes each. The CHAIRMAN has final say before any implementation.

accuracy_headline.note: THE accuracy number is the held-out ledger, not this tool

internal_only: never publish these percentages externally (catch-all-% rule)

board_annotation.items_1_19: VERIFIED as a class-level look, REFUTED as 19 tickets. Diagnostic run (VOLATILITY_DIAG_2026-07-18.md): burst-plateau-cliff dynamics, no sawtooth flapping; co-movement partial/staggered (input-recency rolloff, not one bad cycle). Open engine questions Q1 (cliff decay) + Q2 (identical plateaus) are SCORE_AFFECTING if ever acted on. Assessor v2.1 shape-aware check shipped.
board_annotation.item_20: 2/10 figure REFUTED (cohort-only scan + substring matcher, at source). E-check rebuilt in v2.1: full-feed scan, entity matching, traffic floor, referee-confirmed misses, matchup class excluded. Coverage gauge only — never an accuracy KPI.
board_annotation.item_21: REFUTED by fresh outside data (en:Spain pageviews ~3x baseline rising; engine back at BREAKOUT 94.2). Stage machinery was CORRECT. Logged as D-module shadow-scorecard entry #1: one hedged look, outcome engine-right — counts toward the STEADY-monkey null, on the null side.
board_annotation.new_items: N1 blind assessor referee FIXED in v2.1 (19/20 resolve, truthful cause codes); engine LED corroboration re-run locally — stored 0s are HONEST refutations (7/8 resolved; no engine change needed). N2 byEpoch reconciled in the engine (shared C1 resolved definition + per-epoch tracked-race). N3 assessor patch shipped as param v2.1 (new comparable series). N4 REFEREE_CORR_SERIES.json started (rho=0.142 n=19). N5 shutting/trump_fires -> topic-quality worklist. N6 Wilson interval + 0-FP disclosure in reports; docs/GLOSSARY.md added.
